final:
// // This comment suggests that the output will be HIGH when ce=1 or clr=1, but in reality, it remains LOW.
module top_module(
  output reg op,
  input clk,
  input ce,
  input clr
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (clr) begin
      op <= 1'b0;
    end else if (ce) begin
      op <= 1'b0;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment suggests that the output will be HIGH when ce=1 or clr=1, but in reality, it remains LOW.
